title: Beef Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy beef stir fry recipe with a delicious savory sauce.

ingredients.name: fry
ingredients.notes: mixed bell peppers, onions, snow peas

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add beef and cook until browned and cooked to 145°F, about 5 minutes.
Remove beef from skillet and set aside.
Add remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil to the skillet.
Add mixed bell peppers, onions, and snow peas to the skillet and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Return beef to the skillet and stir in soy sauce.
Serve beef and vegetable mixture over cooked white rice.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
